---
title: "Finnish Greenhouse Productivity"
---

## Row
```{python}
import altair as alt
from altair.datasets import data
import pandas as pd
from scipy.cluster.hierarchy import linkage, leaves_list

RED = 'rgb(228, 129, 105)'
LRED = 'rgb(246, 189, 164)'
BLUE = 'rgb(107, 172, 209)'
LBLUE = 'rgb(175, 211, 230)'
GREY = 'rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.25)'

# Preprocessing
df = pd.read_csv("gh_yields.csv")
# df['Year'] = df['Year'].astype(str)
df['ProdChange'] = df.groupby('Crop')['Productivity'].transform(
    lambda x: x.ffill().pct_change() * 100) 

matrix = df.pivot(index='Crop', columns='Year', values='ProdChange').fillna(0)

Z = linkage(matrix, method='ward')
cluster_order = leaves_list(Z)

sorted_crops = matrix.index[cluster_order].tolist()

# Visualization

crop = alt.selection_point(encodings=['x'], empty=True, nearest=True)

color = (
    alt.when(crop)
    .then(alt.ColorValue("steelblue"))
    .otherwise(alt.ColorValue("grey"))
)


bar = alt.Chart(df, width='container', height=200).mark_bar().encode(
    x=alt.X('Crop:N').sort('-y'),
    y='sum(Area):Q',
    color=color
).add_params(crop)



thresholds = [2, 10, 25]
sizes = [3, 10, 15, 25]

df['Magnitude'] = df['ProdChange'].abs()

df['Year'] = df['Year'].astype(str)

WIDTH = 400

hm = alt.Chart(df, width=WIDTH, height=500).mark_point(shape='stroke', size=(WIDTH/11)**2, opacity=1).encode(
    alt.X('Year:T', timeUnit='year').scale(domain=[2014, 2025]),
    alt.Y('Crop:N').sort(sorted_crops),
    alt.StrokeWidth('Magnitude:Q').scale(type='threshold',
    domain=thresholds ,range=sizes, clamp=True),
    alt.Color('ProdChange:Q').title('Percent change in productivity').scale(type='threshold',
            domain=[-2, 2],
             range=[RED, GREY, BLUE]),
    xOffset=alt.value(-WIDTH / 24),
    tooltip='ProdChange'

)


alt.vconcat(
    hm,
    bar, center=True, autosize='pad'
).resolve_scale(
    strokeWidth='independent',
    color='independent'
).configure_axis(
    grid=False
)
```

```{python}

# scatter with circles encoding area

import altair as alt
from altair.datasets import data
import pandas as pd
from scipy.cluster.hierarchy import linkage, leaves_list

RED = 'rgb(228, 129, 105)'
LRED = 'rgb(246, 189, 164)'
BLUE = 'rgb(107, 172, 209)'
LBLUE = 'rgb(175, 211, 230)'
GREY = 'rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.25)'

# Preprocessing
df = pd.read_csv("gh_yields.csv")
# df['Year'] = df['Year'].astype(str)
df['ProdChange'] = df.groupby('Crop')['Productivity'].transform(
    lambda x: x.ffill().pct_change() * 100) 

def transform_index(df, variable):
    return df.groupby('Crop')[variable].transform(
    lambda x: x / x[~x.isna()].iloc[0] * 100) 

df['AreaIndex'] = transform_index(df, 'Area')
    

df['YieldIndex'] = transform_index(df, 'Yield')

df['ProdIndex'] = transform_index(df, 'Productivity')
    


matrix = df.pivot(index='Crop', columns='Year', values='ProdChange').fillna(0)

Z = linkage(matrix, method='ward')
cluster_order = leaves_list(Z)

sorted_crops = matrix.index[cluster_order].tolist()

# Visualization

crop = alt.selection_point(encodings=['y'], empty=False)

color = (
    alt.when(crop)
    .then(alt.ColorValue("steelblue"))
    .otherwise(alt.ColorValue("grey"))
)

bar = alt.Chart(df, width='container', height=200).mark_bar().encode(
    y=alt.X('Crop:N').sort('-x'),
    x='sum(Area):Q',
    color=color
).add_params(crop)


thresholds = [2, 10, 25]
sizes = [3, 10, 15, 25]

df['Magnitude'] = df['ProdChange'].abs()

df['Year'] = df['Year'].astype(str)

WIDTH = 400

# TODO: in order to sort order, calculate the sort manually.
hm = alt.Chart(df, width=WIDTH, height=500).mark_boxplot(box={'fill': 'transparent', 'stroke': 'black'}, median={'stroke': 'black'}).encode(
    alt.X('Crop:N'),
    alt.Y('ProdChange:Q')
)

zero_line = alt.Chart().mark_rule(color='black').encode(
    y=alt.datum(0)
)

shade = alt.Chart(pd.DataFrame({
    'y1': [-100],   # adjust lower bound if needed
    'y2': [0]
})).mark_rect(
    color=RED,
    opacity=0.2
).encode(
    y='y1:Q',
    y2='y2:Q'
)

base = alt.Chart(df, width=WIDTH, height=300).encode(
    alt.X('Year:T', timeUnit='year').scale(domain=[2014, 2025]),
).transform_filter(
    crop
)

area = base.mark_circle(color='BLUE').encode(alt.Y('AreaIndex:Q'))

yld = base.mark_circle(color='RED').encode(alt.Y('YieldIndex:Q'))

prd = base.mark_line(color='GREY').encode(alt.Y('ProdIndex:Q'))

rule = base.mark_rule(strokeWidth=1).encode(
    alt.Y('YieldIndex:Q'),
    alt.Y2('AreaIndex:Q')
)



alt.vconcat(
    ((hm + shade) | bar),
     rule + yld + area + prd, center=False, autosize='pad'
).resolve_scale(
    strokeWidth='independent',
    color='independent',
    size='independent'
).configure_axis(
    grid=False
)
```
